title: September 21
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|September|hide31=yes}}

'''September 21''' is the 264th day of the year (265th in leap years). There are 101 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1930s|1937]] – [[Ron Cobb]] is born.
*[[1960s#1964|1964]] – [[Jim Marquand]] is born.
*[[1975]] – [[Dominic Pace]] is born.
*[[1983]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 14|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 14]] published.
*[[1985]] – "[[Rampage of the Phlogs]]" and "[[The Trigon Unleashed]]" air on [[ABC Television Network|ABC]].
*1985 – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 118|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 118]] published.
*[[2004]] – The [[original trilogy]] is released on DVD.
*[[2005]] – [[Empire 36|''Empire'' 36]] published.
*[[2011]] – [[Jedi — The Dark Side 5|''Jedi—The Dark Side'' 5]] published.
*2011 – [[Knight Errant: Deluge 2|''Knight Errant: Deluge'' 2]] published.
*2011 – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: The Complete Saga]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 21|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 21]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2020]] – [[Ron Cobb]] dies.
*[[2021]] – "[[Bespin and Other Planets in the Outer Rim]]" published in [[Wikipedia:Spanish|Spanish]].
*[[2022]] – ''[[Star Wars: Andor]]'' premiered on [[Disney+]] with "[[Kassa (episode)|Kassa]]," "[[That Would Be Me]]" and "[[Reckoning (episode)|Reckoning]]."
*2022 – [[Darth Vader (2020) 27|''Darth Vader'' (2020) 27]] published.
*2022 – [[Hyperspace Stories 2|''Hyperspace Stories'' 2]] published.
*2022 – [[The Mandalorian 3|''The Mandalorian'' 3]] published.
